title: extract_test_args index loop: justified by lookahead
description: evaluator.rs extract_test_args uses a manual while i < forms.len() loop with i += 1 / i += 2 lookahead. This is correct: the :comparator tag requires peeking one position ahead (i+1) to consume the comparator name token as part of the same iteration step. A for-each iterator would require peekable + manual advance, which is more complex. The index loop is the right tool here.
